posts.text:
Russia is sharing intelligence that Iran is using to target radar systems protecting our troops. 

Putin wants to draw this war out because he believes a distracted America is a weak America. 

That’s why dismantling Iran’s missiles, drones, nuclear program, and proxy network matters. It’s not just fatal for Iran— it costs Russia too.

The U.S. just hit a $1 trillion deficit in 5 months. Government spending hit an all-time high, with $425 billion in interest payments alone. We're collecting record revenue and still can't pay our bills. America doesn't have a tax problem. It has a spending problem.

This weekend it is important we all take a moment to honor the 13 brave American service members we’ve lost. 

May we keep their families in our prayers, asking that God bring them comfort and peace during such a heartbreaking loss. We also pray for the wounded, that they make a full and speedy recovery, and for the men and women still deployed—that God watches over them and brings them home safely to their loved ones. 🇺🇸

Energy dominance is national security.

The more oil and gas America produces, the less power regimes like Iran and Russia have to weaponize energy against the world.

Universities will now be required to disclose not only which foreign countries fund them—they’ll be made to publicly name exactly who is writing the checks.

This is a long-overdue step toward transparency and exposing the foreign money quietly poisoning our students.

Robert Levinson is another example of an American targeted by the Iranian regime. Nearly 19 years ago, he disappeared in Iran — becoming the longest-held hostage in American history.

As UN ambassador, I was honored to meet with his family, who has never stopped fighting for him. They deserve answers.


FBI Most Wanted (@FBIMostWanted)

FBI Special Agent Robert “Bob” Levinson was abducted from Iran’s Kish Island 19 years ago this month, and still today the #FBI is actively working to uncover the

In 2024, the FBI came to my front door to tell me the Iranian regime had put a hit on my life — anytime, anywhere.

This week, the man who accepted those orders, on American soil, was sentenced to life in prison in a New York court.

Anyone who claims the Iranian regime isn’t a danger to America is ignoring how far its tentacles spread and is willfully ignorant about how far it will go to threaten Americans even in our own country.

Russia is helping Iran target U.S. troops. That tells you everything about trusting Putin. Don’t listen to his words—watch his actions. They always point in the same direction: attacking and weakening the West.


Jacqui Heinrich (@JacquiHeinrich)

WAPO: Russia is providing Iran with targeting information to attack American forces in the Middle East, the first indication that another major U.S. adversary is participating — even indirectly — in the war, according to three officials familiar with t

Iran ignored agreements and pushed a deal worse than the JCPOA. Action became the only option. 

Hudson Institute policy experts have been warning about the regime’s arrogance for years—and they offer the clearest analysis on what comes next. Follow
@RLHeinrichs @Doranimated @Zriboua


Hudson Institute (@HudsonInstitute)

The old Iran deal did not include limitations on ballistic missiles or allow for "anytime inspections."

It did not prevent Iran from developing its nuclear program.

Military

Our alliances matter more than ever. As the situation plays out with Iran we need to be clear eyed about who is a friend and who is a foe.

Video

Not only was Operation Epic Fury in the interest of America’s national security — it also puts Russia and China on notice. They should not test whether America will act to defend our interests and allies.

Video

It’s absurd for Democrats to say the Iranian regime was no threat to America. For decades, they targeted American troops, made the spread of terrorism a priority, relentlessly pursued nuclear weapons, built missiles aimed at our bases, and plotted assassinations against President Trump and other U.S. leaders — myself included — on American soil.

When they chanted “Death to America,” they meant all of us, at any cost.

This is why today will be a history defining moment for the USA. 🇺🇸

Video
Operation Epic Fury is a true example of good vs evil.

We can’t allow any sanctions relief for Iran. 

Any money the regime receives won’t relieve their people, it will go directly to their terror proxies and ballistic missile program.

If Trump goes for another Iran deal, it has to include real access to military sites and research universities. 

The Obama deal didn’t and they proved to be massive blind spots.

Clarity from President Trump on Iran. 

“One thing is certain, I will never allow the world’s No. 1 sponsor of terror, which they are by far, to have a nuclear weapon."

Iran buying missiles from China is a stark reminder of exactly what we’re dealing with. These missiles aren’t defensive — they’ll be used to threaten America and our allies.

If China is arming Iran, there should be consequences. President Trump has an opportunity to use his upcoming trade visit as significant leverage.


Idrees Ali (@idreesali114)

LONDON, Feb 24 (Reuters) - Iran is close to a deal with China to purchase anti‑ship cruise missiles, according to six people with knowledge of the n

Diplomacy will never work with the Iranian regime. They will always lie, cheat, and stall.  

A decisive, surgical strike now could prevent far greater costs later and permanently weaken the ayotollahs. Missing this moment will burden America and our allies for generations to come.
Finish Them
Three Questions
Dolly Parton Approach
Count Your Blessings
Know Your Opponent’s Fears
The American Dream
Fight for the Underdog
Front Row Seat: Lessons Learned with Nikki Haley
Lesson on the Playground
Israel values life. Hamas values terror.
